name: claude-usage
title: Claude Usage
description: Monitor your Claude subscription limits (5-hour session & weekly) right in the macOS menu bar — reads your local Claude Code login, no API key or cookie to paste.
author: abrockmann

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Claude Usage in Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Claude
commands.description: Shows session and weekly utilization of your Claude subscription in the menu bar.

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Show Claude Usage
commands.subtitle: Claude
commands.description: Detailed dashboard with all limits, reset timers, burn rate and projections.

preferences.name: menuBarStyle
preferences.title: Menu Bar Display
preferences.description: What to show as the menu bar title.

preferences.name: showOpus
preferences.title: Model Sub-Limits
preferences.label: Show Opus / Sonnet weekly sub-limits when available
preferences.description: Plans with model-specific weekly caps also expose Opus/Sonnet utilization.
